title: Vallakottai Subramaniyaswami temple
tagline: Vallakottai Subramaniyaswami temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Vallakottai Subramaniyaswami temple (or Vallakottai Murugan temple) in Vallakottai, a panchayat town in Kanchipuram district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated t
overview.description: Vallakottai Subramaniyaswami temple (or Vallakottai Murugan temple) in Vallakottai, a panchayat town in Kanchipuram district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Murugan. Constructed in the Tamil Hindu style of architecture, the temple is located in the Sriperumbudur - Singaperumalkoil road. The temple has a gateway leading to a pillared hall and the sanctum. The temple is open from 6:30 am – 12:00 pm and 5 - 8:30 pm.

topPlaces.name: Vallakottai
topPlaces.description: Vallakottai is a town near Chennai, India. It is situated on the highway between Sriperumbudur and Singaperumalkoil near Chengalpattu.

topPlaces.name: Oragadam
topPlaces.description: Oragadam (Tamil: [oɾaɡaɖam]) is an industrial suburb of Chennai, India. It is located 55 km (34 mi) southwest from the city center and is centrally located between Grand Southern Trunk Road (NH 45) and NH 4.

topPlaces.name: Veemeeswarar Temple, Serapanancheri
topPlaces.description: Serapanancheri is a small village located near Padappai on the Tambaram-Walajabad road in Kanchipuram district of Tamil Nadu in India. Serapanancheri is famous for its Shiva Temple that dates back to c. 1180 CE and its first inscription starts with Chola King Kulothunga III. The main deity of the temple is lord Veemeeswarar (originally believed to be Lord Vinmeeneswarar) who is the ruler of all 27 star constellations.

topPlaces.name: Sunguvarchatram
topPlaces.description: Sunguvarchathram is a town in Kancheepuram District, Tamil Nadu falling under Chennai Metropolitan Area.

topPlaces.name: Varanavasi
topPlaces.description: Varanavasi is a village in the Ariyalur taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Ezhichur
topPlaces.description: Ezhichur is a neighbourhood in Kanchipuram district of Tamil Nadu state in the peninsular India. It is located at an altitude of about 71 m above the mean sea level with the geographical coordinates of 12.813200°N 79.913000°E / 12.813200; 79.913000 (i.e., 12°48'47.5"N, 79°54'46.8"E).

topPlaces.name: Hiranandani Parks, Chennai
topPlaces.description: Hiranandani Parks, formerly known as Hirco Palace Gardens, is a 149-hectare (369-acre) residential township consisting of several skyscraper condominiums in Chennai, India. It is located in the southern suburb of Oragadam.

topPlaces.name: Rajiv Gandhi Memorial
topPlaces.description: Rajiv Gandhi Memorial is a memorial to the former Indian prime minister Rajiv Gandhi in Chennai, India. The memorial is located at Sriperumpudur at the site where he was assassinated on 21 May 1991.

items.note: Vallakottai is a town near Chennai, India. It is situated on the highway between Sriperumbudur and Singaperumalkoil near Chengalpattu.

Oragadam (Tamil: [oɾaɡaɖam]) is an industrial suburb of Chennai, India. It is located 55 km (34 mi) southwest from the city center and is centrally located between Grand Southern Trunk Road (NH 45) and NH 4.

Serapanancheri is a small village located near Padappai on the Tambaram-Walajabad road in Kanchipuram district of Tamil Nadu in India. Serapanancheri is famous for its Shiva Temple that dates back to c. 1180 CE and its first inscription starts with Chola King Kulothunga III. The main deity of the temple is lord Veemeeswarar (originally believed to be Lord Vinmeeneswarar) who is the ruler of all 27 star constellations.
Sunguvarchathram is a town in Kancheepuram District, Tamil Nadu falling under Chennai Metropolitan Area.
Varanavasi is a village in the Ariyalur taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

Ezhichur is a neighbourhood in Kanchipuram district of Tamil Nadu state in the peninsular India. It is located at an altitude of about 71 m above the mean sea level with the geographical coordinates of 12.813200°N 79.913000°E / 12.813200; 79.913000 (i.e., 12°48'47.5"N, 79°54'46.8"E).

Hiranandani Parks, formerly known as Hirco Palace Gardens, is a 149-hectare (369-acre) residential township consisting of several skyscraper condominiums in Chennai, India. It is located in the southern suburb of Oragadam.
Rajiv Gandhi Memorial is a memorial to the former Indian prime minister Rajiv Gandhi in Chennai, India. The memorial is located at Sriperumpudur at the site where he was assassinated on 21 May 1991.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vallakottai Subramaniyaswami temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vallakottai Subramaniyaswami temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vallakottai Subramaniyaswami temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (29 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (43 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vallakottai Subramaniyaswami temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vallakottai Subramaniyaswami temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vallakottai Subramaniyaswami temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vallakottai Subramaniyaswami temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vallakottai Subramaniyaswami temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vallakottai, Oragadam, Veemeeswarar Temple, Serapanancheri, Sunguvarchatram, Varanavasi.
